episodes.title: The Kanungu Massacre: Africa's Deadliest Cult Story
episodes.description:
She wanted power at all costs... and over 1,000 people paid the ultimate price. 

In 2000, a church in Uganda went up in flames, revealing a dark web of manipulation, false prophecies, and greed spun by a woman named Credonia Mwerinde. 

Drop your theories in the comments. Is she still out there? 👇

#truecrimecommunity #truecrimestories #truecrimedocumentary
subjects: Movement for the Restoration of the Ten Commandments of God
